qa_pairs.question: How do I delete a file from an Arbutus object storage bucket using s3cmd?
qa_pairs.answer: To delete a file from a bucket, use the `s3cmd rm s3://BUCKET_NAME/FILE_NAME.dat` command, replacing BUCKET_NAME and FILE_NAME.dat with your specific bucket and file details.

qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of ACLs and policies for Arbutus object storage buckets?
qa_pairs.answer: ACLs (Access Control Lists) and policies govern who can access what resources within the object store buckets.

qa_pairs.question: Which s3cmd command is used to configure Access Control Lists (ACLs)?
qa_pairs.answer: The `setacl` command is used to configure Access Control Lists (ACLs) with s3cmd.

qa_pairs.question: How can I make an Arbutus object storage bucket and all its files publicly accessible using s3cmd?
qa_pairs.answer: To make a bucket and all its files publicly accessible, use the command `s3cmd setacl --acl-public -r s3://BUCKET_NAME/`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the URL format for accessing publicly available files in an Arbutus object storage bucket?
qa_pairs.answer: Publicly accessible files can be accessed via URLs formatted like `https://object-arbutus.alliancecan.ca/PROJECT_ID:BUCKET_NAME/FILE_NAME.dat`.

qa_pairs.question: How do I restrict access to an Arbutus object storage bucket to only the owner using s3cmd?
qa_pairs.answer: To limit access to a bucket to only the owner, use the command `s3cmd setacl --acl-private s3://BUCKET_NAME/`.

qa_pairs.question: How can I view the current configuration of an Arbutus object storage bucket using s3cmd?
qa_pairs.answer: The current configuration of a bucket can be viewed using the `s3cmd info s3://BUCKET_NAME/` command, replacing BUCKET_NAME with the actual bucket name.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find more sophisticated examples for s3cmd ACLs and policies?
qa_pairs.answer: More sophisticated examples for s3cmd ACLs and policies can be found in the s3cmd help site (https://www.s3express.com/help/help.html) or in the s3cmd(1) man page.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find instructions and examples for managing bucket policies for Arbutus Object Store with s3cmd?
qa_pairs.answer: Instructions on managing bucket policies for your object store, including examples using s3cmd, are available on the main Arbutus object storage page.
